content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Polycarp's phone book". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/858/problem/D
constraints: The length of each name and phone number does not exceed 20 characters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of names in the phone book. Then n lines follow, each containing a name and a phone number separated by a space.
content.outputFormat: For each query, print the corresponding phone number if it exists, otherwise print 'Not found'.

hidden.label: uniform/edge cases
hidden.input:
5
John John
Alice Alice
Bob Bob
Charlie Charlie
David David

hidden.label: general mixed case
hidden.input:
7
John 123
Alice 456
Bob 789
Charlie 1011
David 1213
Eve 1415
Frank 1617

solution.approach: Use a hash table to store the names and phone numbers, then query the hash table for each name.
